news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank receives RBI relief, marking a significant step toward universal banking transition.
The transition details and implications were explained on ET Now.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank receives RBI relief, marking a significant step toward universal banking transition.
The transition details and implications were explained on ET Now.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank receives RBI relaxation on NOFHC requirement, aiding its transition to Universal Bank status.
Shares traded at Rs. 964.1 on BSE, intraday high Rs. 980.4, turnover Rs. 3.4cr.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank receives RBI relaxation on NOFHC requirement, aiding its transition to Universal Bank status.
Shares traded at Rs. 964.1 on BSE, intraday high Rs. 980.4, turnover Rs. 3.4cr.

news.title:
RBI approves AU Small Finance Bank's transition to a Universal Bank.
NOFHC mandated only if future group entities emerge; final license application pending.
news.summary:
RBI approves AU Small Finance Bank's transition to a Universal Bank.
NOFHC mandated only if future group entities emerge; final license application pending.

news.title:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.
news.summary:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.

news.title:
Banks like Ujjivan SFB, South Indian Bank, Tamilnad Mercantile Bank, and AU SFB showed strong CASA growth in Q3FY26.
CASA deposits boost profitability by lowering funding costs; Ujjivan SFB saw 33.2% YoY growth, while AU SFB reported 16% YoY growth.
news.summary:
Banks like Ujjivan SFB, South Indian Bank, Tamilnad Mercantile Bank, and AU SFB showed strong CASA growth in Q3FY26.
CASA deposits boost profitability by lowering funding costs; Ujjivan SFB saw 33.2% YoY growth, while AU SFB reported 16% YoY growth.

news.title:
AB Capital, L&T Finance added to MSCI Index; IRCTC exits.
AB Capital, L&T Finance, AU Bank set for inflows; IRCTC faces outflows.
news.summary:
AB Capital, L&T Finance added to MSCI Index; IRCTC exits.
AB Capital, L&T Finance, AU Bank set for inflows; IRCTC faces outflows.

news.title:
MSCI will adjust AU SFB's stock weight today at 3 PM.
The adjustment increases weight by USD 172M (Rs 16B).
news.summary:
MSCI will adjust AU SFB's stock weight today at 3 PM.
The adjustment increases weight by USD 172M (Rs 16B).

news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed AU Small Finance Bank's AA (Stable) rating for Rs.1004 cr Tier II Bonds.
Rating reflects retail asset franchise, asset quality, capitalization, and earnings; Rs.856 cr bonds redeemed.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed AU Small Finance Bank's AA (Stable) rating for Rs.1004 cr Tier II Bonds.
Rating reflects retail asset franchise, asset quality, capitalization, and earnings; Rs.856 cr bonds redeemed.

news.title:
Haryana ACB probes alleged forgery involving IDFC First Bank, AU Small Finance Bank.
A committee recommended police investigation into procedural lapses by bank officials.
news.summary:
Haryana ACB probes alleged forgery involving IDFC First Bank, AU Small Finance Bank.
A committee recommended police investigation into procedural lapses by bank officials.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank begins internal probe following Haryana account issues, with employees put off duty.
The board has been informed, and the bank continues its internal review, denying any irregularities or wrongdoing.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank begins internal probe following Haryana account issues, with employees put off duty.
The board has been informed, and the bank continues its internal review, denying any irregularities or wrongdoing.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank fell 5.9% to Rs 968.3 after Haryana delisted it as an empanelled lender.
Haryana acted over allegations of fraudulent activities; the bank received a related communication earlier.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank fell 5.9% to Rs 968.3 after Haryana delisted it as an empanelled lender.
Haryana acted over allegations of fraudulent activities; the bank received a related communication earlier.

news.title:
Nifty remains in the 25,500-26,000 range, with banks like IDFC First, AU Small Finance, and Axis Bank in focus.
PSU Bank index gained 5.5% last week; exporters like UPL and Vikram Solar react to Trump tariff uncertainties.
news.summary:
Nifty remains in the 25,500-26,000 range, with banks like IDFC First, AU Small Finance, and Axis Bank in focus.
PSU Bank index gained 5.5% last week; exporters like UPL and Vikram Solar react to Trump tariff uncertainties.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank and AU Small Finance Bank shares plunged after fraud linked to Haryana govt accounts.
Experts advise a wait-and-watch approach as investigations and provisions may impact Q4 results.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank and AU Small Finance Bank shares plunged after fraud linked to Haryana govt accounts.
Experts advise a wait-and-watch approach as investigations and provisions may impact Q4 results.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank clarifies Haryana Govt. de-empanelment; no fraud found.
Govt. deposits form 0.4% of total; bank seeks re-empanelment and investigates.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank clarifies Haryana Govt. de-empanelment; no fraud found.
Govt. deposits form 0.4% of total; bank seeks re-empanelment and investigates.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank, AU Small Finance Bank de-empanelled for govt business in Haryana.
No govt funds will be parked, deposited, or transacted through these banks.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank, AU Small Finance Bank de-empanelled for govt business in Haryana.
No govt funds will be parked, deposited, or transacted through these banks.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank sees a 13.5% OI surge, reflecting bullish sentiment.
Strong volume and price momentum near 52-week high indicate upside potential.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank sees a 13.5% OI surge, reflecting bullish sentiment.
Strong volume and price momentum near 52-week high indicate upside potential.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
Jefferies highlights AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Godrej Properties, Hindustan Zinc, JSW Energy, Bharat Forge, and Voltas.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
Jefferies highlights AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Godrej Properties, Hindustan Zinc, JSW Energy, Bharat Forge, and Voltas.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank certified timely interest payment of Rs. 44.7 lakh for NCDs (ISIN INE519Q08160) on Feb 16, 2026.
Payment delayed as Feb 15, 2026, was Sunday; complied with SEBI circular dated July 11, 2025.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank certified timely interest payment of Rs. 44.7 lakh for NCDs (ISIN INE519Q08160) on Feb 16, 2026.
Payment delayed as Feb 15, 2026, was Sunday; complied with SEBI circular dated July 11, 2025.

news.title:
RBI approves reappointment of Mr. Sanjay Agarwal as MD & CEO of AU Small Finance Bank for 3 years from April 19, 2026.
The approval follows prior nods from the Board and shareholders of AU Small Finance Bank.
news.summary:
RBI approves reappointment of Mr. Sanjay Agarwal as MD & CEO of AU Small Finance Bank for 3 years from April 19, 2026.
The approval follows prior nods from the Board and shareholders of AU Small Finance Bank.

news.title:
AU Small Finance Bank to see $172M inflows post MSCI weight increase affecting 15.6M shares.
IRCTC excluded from MSCI index with $142M outflows; India's index weight stays at 14.1%.
news.summary:
AU Small Finance Bank to see $172M inflows post MSCI weight increase affecting 15.6M shares.
IRCTC excluded from MSCI index with $142M outflows; India's index weight stays at 14.1%.
